chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1710 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.7368/2018 2. For hearing of main case 23.04.2025 Mr. Muhammad Inzimam Sharif, advocate for the petitioner Syed Shohrat Hussain Rizvi, advocate for respondent Ms. Zakia advocate holds brief for Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, advocate for respondent Mr. Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, show cause notice has been impugned herein, however, the same is patently unwarranted in view of Division Bench judgment of this court reported as 2017 PTD 1. Be that as it may, he states that the notice shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the same be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondents articulate no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
